name: AIMailer - Dual Daily AI Roundups
summary: Automated dual daily emails with a Django-based Web Control Panel for managing newsletters and subscribers.
goals: Deliver two complementary daily emails covering AI tools and model releases
Automate fetch → dedupe → summarize → rank → email pipeline for both streams
Provide a robust Web Control Panel for newsletter discovery and management
Enable user-friendly subscriber and newsletter administration
primary_features: Dual email system: AI Tooling (12 PM) + AI Models & Releases (3 PM)
Django Web Control Panel: Manage newsletters, subscribers, and RSS sources
HTML email composition and automated sending via AWS SQS + SMTP
Custom user model with email-based authentication and subscription tiers
Admin UI improvements: Interactive tooltips and easy keyword management
secondary_features: AWS SQS queuing for reliable email delivery
Automated scheduling via cron and Celery Beat
Interactive Newsletter admin with JS-driven field conversion

ai_tooling.name: Daily AI Tooling Roundup
ai_tooling.focus: Developer tools, frameworks, coding assistance, business tooling

ai_models.name: Daily AI Models & Releases
ai_models.focus: New models, releases, coding AI, enterprise features, major updates

security_considerations: Email as primary identifier with CustomUser model
Secure password management and JWT for API access
Dockerised environment with separate db and redis services

development_state.next_steps: Expand frontend and implement full newsletter CRUD API

architecture.overview: Composite Architecture: AI Pipeline (CLI/Worker) + Web Control Panel (Django)

current_capabilities: Robust administrative access via `reset_admin` management command
User-friendly Newsletter admin with tooltips and simplified keyword entry
Email-based superuser login with staff/superuser flag management
Automated dual daily email generation and delivery
Multi-source RSS feed processing and AI summarization
